title: Derk Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Derk Squadron''' was the name of a squadron consisting of a sole [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], belonging to the [[Mugaari]], that participated in the [[Defense of Outpost D-34|First Battle of Javin]] against [[Outpost D-34]].
[[File:Derk.png|thumb|The Derk Squadron X-Wing]]

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
